### 🕒 2026. 2. 11. 오후 6:12:30 KST
- **내용**: 제목이 Dasan New Town Branch Status Report 인 Gemini 캔버스 생성됨
```slides
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Dasan New Town Branch - Registration Status Report</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css">
    <style>
/* 1. THE SETUP - Dark Dashboard Theme */
* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
  background-color: #0f172a; /* Slate 900 */
  display: grid;
  gap: 20px;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  margin: 0;
  min-height: 100vh;
  padding: 20px 0;
  place-items: center;
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
}

.slide-container {
  align-items: center;
  background-color: #1e293b; /* Slate 800 */
  border-radius: 16px;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), 0 8px 10px -6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 720px;
  justify-content: center;
  overflow: hidden;
  padding: 40px; /* Reduced padding for more content space */
  position: relative;
  width: 1280px;
  color: #f8fafc; /* Slate 50 */
}

/* Background Accents */
.slide-container::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: -50%;
  left: -50%;
  width: 200%;
  height: 200%;
  background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.03) 0%, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0) 70%);
  z-index: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.slide-container > * {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}

/* 2. TYPOGRAPHY */
h1, h2, h3, h4 {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  margin: 0;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}

.slide-container h1 {
  font-size: 64px;
  line-height: 1.1;
  background: linear-gradient(to right, #38bdf8, #818cf8);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  margin-bottom: 24px;
}

.slide-container .slide-title {
  font-size: 42px;
  color: #e2e8f0;
  width: 100%;
  text-align: left;
  margin-bottom: 30px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #334155;
  padding-bottom: 15px;
}

.slide-container p, .slide-container li {
  font-size: 20px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: #cbd5e1; /* Slate 300 */
}

.slide-container .subtitle {
  font-size: 24px;
  color: #94a3b8;
  font-weight: 300;
}

/* 3. LAYOUT UTILITIES */
.content-area {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  flex-grow: 1;
  width: 100%;
  justify-content: center;
}

/* Grid Layout for KPIs */
.kpi-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 30px;
  width: 100%;
  margin-top: 20px;
}

.kpi-card {
  background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5);
  border: 1px solid #334155;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 30px;
  text-align: center;
  transition: transform 0.2s;
}

.kpi-value {
  font-size: 72px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #38bdf8; /* Sky 400 */
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  margin: 10px 0;
}

.kpi-label {
  font-size: 18px;
  color: #94a3b8;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

.kpi-sub {
  font-size: 16px;
  color: #10b981; /* Emerald 500 */
  margin-top: 5px;
}

.kpi-sub.negative {
  color: #f43f5e; /* Rose 500 */
}

/* Two Column Layout */
.two-column {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 60px;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  align-items: center;
}

/* Image Wrappers */
.image-wrapper {
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  height: 100%;
  max-height: 450px;
}

.image-wrapper img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
}

/* Bleed Image Layout - Strict Implementation */
.slide-container.bleed-image-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  align-items: start;
  padding: 0;
  gap: 0;
}

.slide-container.bleed-image-layout > .content-container {
  padding: 80px 60px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  height: 100%;
}

.slide-container.bleed-image-layout > .image-container {
  height: 720px;
  width: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.slide-container.bleed-image-layout img.bleed-image-side {
  width: 100%;
  height: 720px;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}

/* Chart Styles */
.chart-container {
  width: 100%;
  height: 400px;
  position: relative;
}

.bar-chart-container {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 25px;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 900px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.bar-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 20px;
}

.bar-label {
  width: 150px;
  text-align: right;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #cbd5e1;
}

.bar-track {
  flex-grow: 1;
  background: #334155;
  height: 40px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
}

.bar-fill {
  height: 100%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  padding-right: 15px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: white;
  transition: width 1s ease-out;
}

.bar-target-line {
  position: absolute;
  right: 0;
  top: -25px;
  bottom: -5px;
  width: 2px;
  background: #f43f5e;
  z-index: 10;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
}

.bar-target-label {
  position: absolute;
  top: -25px;
  background: #f43f5e;
  color: white;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 12px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* Formula Container */
.formula-box {
  background: #0f172a;
  border: 1px solid #334155;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 30px;
  margin-top: 30px;
  text-align: center;
}

.formula-box math {
  font-size: 32px;
  color: #38bdf8;
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
}

/* Table Style for Heatmap */
.heatmap-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  margin-top: 20px;
}

.heatmap-table th, .heatmap-table td {
  border: 1px solid #334155;
  padding: 15px;
  text-align: center;
  color: #cbd5e1;
}

.heatmap-table th {
  background: #1e293b;
  color: #fff;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.heatmap-table td.high {
  background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.2);
  color: #34d399;
  font-weight: bold;
}

.heatmap-table td.low {
  background: rgba(244, 63, 94, 0.1);
  color: #f43f5e;
}

/* Area Chart SVG Specifics */
.area-chart-svg {
  overflow: visible;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}

.area-chart-svg .grid line {
  stroke: #334155;
  stroke-width: 1;
}

.area-chart-svg .area-fill {
  fill: url(#chartGradient);
  opacity: 0.6;
}

.area-chart-svg .line-stroke {
  fill: none;
  stroke: #38bdf8;
  stroke-width: 3;
}

.area-chart-svg text {
  fill: #94a3b8;
  font-size: 14px;
}

    </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- Slide 1: Title Slide (Full Background Image) -->
<div class="slide-container full-bg-image" id="slide1" style="background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.85), rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.9)), url('http://googleusercontent.com/image_collection/image_retrieval/4605999009152834179'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;">
    <div class="content-overlay" style="text-align: center; max-width: 900px;">
        <h3 style="color: #38bdf8; letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin-bottom: 20px;">DASAN NEW TOWN BRANCH</h3>
        <h1>Experiential Class<br>Registration Report</h1>
        <p class="subtitle" style="margin-top: 30px; border-top: 1px solid #334155; padding-top: 30px;">
            Status Analysis & Goal Projection (D-7)<br>
            <span style="font-size: 18px; color: #94a3b8;">February 11, 2026</span>
        </p>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Slide 2: Executive Summary (KPIs) -->
<div class="slide-container" id="slide2">
    <h2 class="slide-title">Current Status Overview</h2>
    <div class="content-area">
        <div class="kpi-grid">
            <!-- KPI 1: Total Inquiries -->
            <div class="kpi-card">
                <div class="kpi-label">Total Inquiries (DB)</div>
                <div class="kpi-value">317</div>
                <div class="kpi-sub negative">Target: 400 (Gap: -83)</div>
            </div>
            <!-- KPI 2: Attendees -->
            <div class="kpi-card">
                <div class="kpi-label">Confirmed Attendees</div>
                <div class="kpi-value">268</div>
                <div class="kpi-sub negative">Target: 300 (Gap: -32)</div>
            </div>
            <!-- KPI 3: Conversion Rate -->
            <div class="kpi-card">
                <div class="kpi-label">Conversion Rate</div>
                <div class="kpi-value">84.5%</div>
                <div class="kpi-sub" style="color: #10b981;">Excellent Performance</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <p style="margin-top: 40px; text-align: center; color: #94a3b8; font-size: 18px;">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info"></i> With 7 days remaining, DB acquisition is the primary bottleneck. Conversion remains strong.
        </p>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Slide 3: Growth Trend (Area Chart) -->
<div class="slide-container" id="slide3">
    <h2 class="slide-title">Cumulative Growth Trend (Dec 29 - Feb 11)</h2>
    <div class="content-area">
        <div class="chart-container">
            <svg class="area-chart-svg" viewBox="0 0 1000 350">
                <defs>
                    <linearGradient id="chartGradient" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                        <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#38bdf8" stop-opacity="0.5"/>
                        <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#38bdf8" stop-opacity="0"/>
                    </linearGradient>
                </defs>
                <!-- Grid -->
                <g class="grid">
                    <line x1="50" y1="300" x2="950" y2="300" stroke="#334155" />
                    <line x1="50" y1="225" x2="950" y2="225" stroke="#334155" stroke-dasharray="4"/>
                    <line x1="50" y1="150" x2="950" y2="150" stroke="#334155" stroke-dasharray="4"/>
                    <line x1="50" y1="75" x2="950" y2="75" stroke="#334155" stroke-dasharray="4"/>
                </g>
                
                <!-- Axis Labels -->
                <text x="30" y="305" text-anchor="end">0</text>
                <text x="30" y="230" text-anchor="end">100</text>
                <text x="30" y="155" text-anchor="end">200</text>
                <text x="30" y="80" text-anchor="end">300</text>
                <text x="30" y="10" text-anchor="end">400</text>

                <!-- X Axis Dates (Approximate) -->
                <text x="50" y="330" text-anchor="middle">12/29</text>
                <text x="275" y="330" text-anchor="middle">1/12</text>
                <text x="500" y="330" text-anchor="middle">1/26</text>
                <text x="725" y="330" text-anchor="middle">2/4</text>
                <text x="950" y="330" text-anchor="middle">2/11</text>

                <!-- Data Path: Points mapped from 42 to 317 -->
                <!-- 0-300px scale. 400 = 0px y. 300 = 75px. 0 = 300px. -->
                <!-- 42 -> 268px, 153 -> 185px, 251 -> 111px, 298 -> 76px, 317 -> 62px -->
                <path d="M50,268 L275,185 L500,111 L725,76 L950,62 L950,300 L50,300 Z" class="area-fill" />
                <polyline points="50,268 275,185 500,111 725,76 950,62" class="line-stroke" />
                
                <!-- Data Points -->
                <circle cx="50" cy="268" r="4" fill="#38bdf8" />
                <circle cx="275" cy="185" r="4" fill="#38bdf8" />
                <circle cx="500" cy="111" r="4" fill="#38bdf8" />
                <circle cx="725" cy="76" r="4" fill="#38bdf8" />
                <circle cx="950" cy="62" r="6" fill="#fff" stroke="#38bdf8" stroke-width="2"/>
                
                <!-- Current Label -->
                <text x="950" y="45" text-anchor="middle" fill="#fff" font-weight="bold" font-size="16">317</text>
            </svg>
        </div>
        <p class="chart-summary">
            Growth has stabilized. The recent daily average (approx. 3.7/day) indicates a plateau, requiring immediate intervention to reach the final stretch goal.
        </p>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Slide 4: Gap Analysis (Bar Chart) -->
<div class="slide-container bleed-image-layout" id="slide4">
    <div class="content-container">
        <h2 class="slide-title" style="margin-bottom: 40px;">Gap Analysis (D-7)</h2>
        <div class="bar-chart-container">
            <!-- DB Bar -->
            <div class="bar-row">
                <div class="bar-label">Inquiries (DB)</div>
                <div class="bar-track">
                    <div class="bar-fill" style="width: 79%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #38bdf8, #2563eb);">317</div>
                    <div class="bar-target-line" style="left: 100%;">
                        <div class="bar-target-label">Target: 400</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Attendee Bar -->
            <div class="bar-row" style="margin-top: 20px;">
                <div class="bar-label">Attendees</div>
                <div class="bar-track">
                    <div class="bar-fill" style="width: 89%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #34d399, #059669);">268</div>
                    <div class="bar-target-line" style="left: 100%;">
                        <div class="bar-target-label">Target: 300</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div style="margin-top: 60px;">
            <h3 style="color: #f43f5e; margin-bottom: 10px;">Critical Insight</h3>
            <p>We are short <b>83 DBs</b>. To close this gap in 7 days, we need to triple our daily acquisition rate immediately.</p>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="image-container">
        <img class="bleed-image-side" src="http://googleusercontent.com/image_collection/image_retrieval/1523691908275231650" alt="Target Board Concept">
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Slide 5: Class Distribution (Table) -->
<div class="slide-container" id="slide5">
    <h2 class="slide-title">Class Utilization: Weekend Saturation</h2>
    <div class="content-area">
        <p style="margin-bottom: 20px;">Weekends are near capacity, while weekdays remain significantly underutilized.</p>
        <table class="heatmap-table">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Class Type</th>
                    <th>Mon</th>
                    <th>Tue</th>
                    <th>Wed</th>
                    <th>Thu</th>
                    <th>Fri</th>
                    <th>Sat</th>
                    <th>Sun</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr>
                    <td>Attendees</td>
                    <td class="low">2</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td class="high">19</td>
                    <td class="high">25</td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                    <td>Util Rate</td>
                    <td class="low">Low</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td class="high">High</td>
                    <td class="high">Max</td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                    <td>4-5 Years</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>19</td>
                    <td>25</td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                    <td>6-7 Years</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>23</td>
                    <td>26</td>
                </tr>
                 <tr>
                    <td>8-9 Years</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                    <td>19</td>
                    <td>25</td>
                </tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>
        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 20px;">
            <div style="background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #f43f5e; width: 48%;">
                <h4 style="color: #f43f5e;">Weekday Alert</h4>
                <p style="font-size: 16px;">Monday classes have only 2 attendees. Significant capacity available.</p>
            </div>
            <div style="background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #34d399; width: 48%;">
                <h4 style="color: #34d399;">Weekend Success</h4>
                <p style="font-size: 16px;">Sunday classes averaging 20-26 attendees. Nearing maximum safe capacity.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Slide 6: Forecast Logic (Math) -->
<div class="slide-container" id="slide6">
    <h2 class="slide-title">Forecast: Required vs. Current Pace</h2>
    <div class="content-area">
        <div class="two-column">
            <div>
                <h3 style="color: #94a3b8; margin-bottom: 15px;">Target Calculation</h3>
                <p>To reach 400 Inquiries (DB) with 83 remaining:</p>
                
                <div class="formula-box">
                    <math display="block">
                        <mfrac>
                            <mn>83 <mtext> (Gap)</mtext></mn>
                            <mn>7 <mtext> (Days)</mtext></mn>
                        </mfrac>
                        <mo>=</mo>
                        <mn>11.8</mn>
                        <mtext> DB / Day</mtext>
                    </math>
                </div>
                
                <p style="margin-top: 20px; text-align: center;">We need approx. <b>12 new inquiries daily</b>.</p>
            </div>
            
            <div style="border-left: 1px solid #334155; padding-left: 40px;">
                <h3 style="color: #94a3b8; margin-bottom: 15px;">Reality Check</h3>
                <ul style="list-style: none; padding: 0;">
                    <li style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
                        <span style="display: block; font-size: 14px; color: #94a3b8;">Current Daily Avg (Last 7 Days)</span>
                        <span style="font-size: 32px; color: #f43f5e; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';">~3.7 DB / Day</span>
                    </li>
                    <li style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
                        <span style="display: block; font-size: 14px; color: #94a3b8;">Projected Outcome at Current Pace</span>
                        <span style="font-size: 32px; color: #f43f5e; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';">343 Total</span>
                        <span style="font-size: 16px; color: #f43f5e;">(Miss by 57)</span>
                    </li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Slide 7: Action Plan -->
<div class="slide-container bleed-image-layout" id="slide7">
    <div class="image-container">
        <img class="bleed-image-side" src="http://googleusercontent.com/image_collection/image_retrieval/3088685563636478975" alt="Strategic Meeting">
    </div>
    <div class="content-container">
        <h2 class="slide-title">Action Plan: Closing the Gap</h2>
        <div class="content-area" style="align-items: flex-start;">
            <ul style="list-style: none; padding: 0; margin-top: 20px;">
                <li style="margin-bottom: 30px; border-left: 3px solid #38bdf8; padding-left: 20px;">
                    <h3 style="color: #38bdf8; margin-bottom: 5px;">1. Weekday Promotion Blitz</h3>
                    <p style="font-size: 18px;">Target local parents with specific incentives for Monday-Friday afternoon slots to balance the weekend overflow.</p>
                </li>
                <li style="margin-bottom: 30px; border-left: 3px solid #f43f5e; padding-left: 20px;">
                    <h3 style="color: #f43f5e; margin-bottom: 5px;">2. "Last 7 Days" Campaign</h3>
                    <p style="font-size: 18px;">Execute a high-urgency message highlighting "Closing Soon" to drive the remaining 83 DBs needed.</p>
                </li>
                <li style="border-left: 3px solid #10b981; padding-left: 20px;">
                    <h3 style="color: #10b981; margin-bottom: 5px;">3. Conversion Focus</h3>
                    <p style="font-size: 18px;">Maintain the excellent 84% conversion rate by personally following up with every new lead within 1 hour.</p>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Slide 8: Q&A -->
<div class="slide-container" id="slide8">
    <div class="content-area" style="text-align: center;">
        <h2 style="font-size: 80px; margin-bottom: 20px; background: linear-gradient(to right, #38bdf8, #818cf8); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;">Q & A</h2>
        <p style="font-size: 24px; color: #cbd5e1;">Discussion & Next Steps</p>
        <div style="margin-top: 60px; font-size: 18px; color: #64748b;">
            Reporting: CS Team (Seo Min-jung)
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

</body>
</html>
```

### 🕒 2026. 2. 11. 오후 5:56:26 KST
- **내용**: 제목이 Soleas Weekly Report 인 Gemini 캔버스 생성됨
```slides
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Soleas Weekly Report</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700&family=Roboto:wght@300;400;500;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css">
    <style>
        /* 1. THE SETUP & BRAND COLORS */
        :root {
            --color-bg: #111111;       /* Deep Black */
            --color-gold: #CCB85F;     /* Soleas Gold */
            --color-green: #2A5C35;    /* Pitch Green */
            --color-white: #FFFFFF;
            --color-grey: #A3A3A3;
            --font-title: 'Playfair Display', serif; /* Replacement for Times New Roman */
            --font-body: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            background-color: #222;
            display: grid;
            gap: 20px;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            margin: 0;
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px 0;
            place-items: center;
        }

        .slide-container {
            align-items: center;
            background-color: var(--color-bg);
            border-radius: 0; /* Google Slides style usually has sharp corners, but we keep slight rounding for preview */
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            height: 720px;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;
            padding: 50px 80px; /* Standard margins */
            position: relative;
            width: 1280px;
            color: var(--color-white);
        }

        /* Top Line Decoration (except title/section slides) */
        .slide-container:not(.title-layout):not(.section-title-layout)::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 80px;
            left: 50px;
            width: 670px; /* From script logic */
            height: 1px;
            background-color: var(--color-grey);
        }

        /* 2. TYPOGRAPHY */
        h1, h2, h3 {
            font-family: var(--font-title);
            margin: 0;
        }

        p, li, td, th, div {
            font-family: var(--font-body);
        }

        /* Slide Titles */
        .slide-title {
            position: absolute;
            top: 30px;
            left: 50px;
            font-family: var(--font-title);
            font-size: 36px;
            color: var(--color-gold);
            font-weight: 700;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .slide-subtitle {
            position: absolute;
            top: 85px;
            left: 50px;
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            font-size: 14px;
            color: var(--color-grey);
            z-index: 10;
        }

        /* Content Area for standard slides */
        .content-area {
            margin-top: 80px; /* Push content below header */
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        /* 3. SPECIFIC LAYOUTS */

        /* Title Slide */
        .title-layout {
            text-align: left;
            width: 100%;
            padding-left: 50px;
        }
        .title-layout h1 {
            font-size: 80px; /* Increased for impact */
            color: var(--color-white);
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            line-height: 1.1;
        }
        .title-layout p.main-sub {
            font-size: 24px;
            color: var(--color-gold);
            margin-bottom: 60px;
        }
        .title-layout p.info {
            font-size: 16px;
            color: var(--color-grey);
        }

        /* Section Title */
        .section-title-layout {
            text-align: center;
            border: 2px solid var(--color-gold); 
            /* Optional border to frame section slides */
        }
        .section-title-layout h2 {
            font-size: 60px;
            color: var(--color-gold);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .section-title-layout.green-theme h2 {
            color: var(--color-green);
        }
        .section-title-layout hr {
            width: 100px;
            border: 2px solid var(--color-white);
            margin: 0 auto 30px auto;
        }

        /* Two Column Layout */
        .two-column {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 60px;
            align-items: center;
            height: 100%;
        }

        /* Highlighted Numbers */
        .highlight-numbers-layout {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-around;
            width: 100%;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .number-item {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .number-val {
            font-size: 80px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--color-white);
            font-family: var(--font-title);
        }
        .number-label {
            font-size: 20px;
            color: var(--color-grey);
            margin-top: 10px;
        }
        .insight-box {
            background-color: rgba(204, 184, 95, 0.1); /* Gold tint */
            border-left: 4px solid var(--color-gold);
            padding: 20px;
            margin-top: 40px;
            color: var(--color-gold);
            font-size: 18px;
        }

        /* Table Layout */
        table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
            font-size: 18px;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        th, td {
            padding: 15px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #333;
            text-align: left;
        }
        th {
            background-color: var(--color-gold);
            color: var(--color-bg);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-family: var(--font-title);
        }
        td {
            color: var(--color-white);
        }
        tr:last-child td {
            border-bottom: none;
        }

        /* Images */
        .image-wrapper {
            width: 100%;
            height: 400px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--color-grey);
        }
        .image-wrapper img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
        }

        /* Lists */
        ul.custom-list {
            list-style: none;
            padding: 0;
        }
        ul.custom-list li {
            margin-bottom: 25px;
            font-size: 20px;
            padding-left: 20px;
            border-left: 3px solid var(--color-gold);
        }
        ul.custom-list li strong {
            color: var(--color-gold);
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            font-size: 22px;
        }

        /* Tiled with Icons */
        .tiled-icons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 30px;
            width: 100%;
        }
        .icon-tile {
            flex: 1;
            background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .icon-tile i {
            font-size: 40px;
            color: var(--color-gold);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .icon-tile h3 {
            font-size: 24px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            color: var(--color-white);
        }
        .icon-tile p {
            font-size: 16px;
            color: var(--color-grey);
            line-height: 1.5;
        }

        /* Quote / ROI */
        .roi-container {
            text-align: center;
            border: 2px solid var(--color-gold);
            padding: 60px;
            border-radius: 20px;
        }
        .roi-val {
            font-size: 60px;
            color: var(--color-gold);
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            font-family: var(--font-title);
        }
        .roi-text {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-style: italic;
            color: var(--color-white);
        }
        
        /* Bleed Image */
        .bleed-image-right {
             display: grid;
             grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
             height: 100%;
             width: 100%;
             padding: 0;
        }
        .bleed-content {
            padding: 80px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .bleed-img {
            height: 720px;
            width: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
        }

    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- Slide 1: Title Slide -->
    <div class="slide-container title-layout" style="background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(17,17,17,0.8), rgba(17,17,17,0.8)), url('http://googleusercontent.com/image_collection/image_retrieval/6811050688297994697'); background-size: cover;">
        <h1>MARKETING & CS<br>PERFORMANCE REVIEW</h1>
        <p class="main-sub">마케팅 & CS팀 주간 성과 상세 보고</p>
        <div style="margin-top: 100px;">
            <p class="info">2026. 02. 12 (목)</p>
            <p class="info">발표자: 강승훈 과장</p>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Slide 2: Agenda -->
    <div class="slide-container">
        <h2 class="slide-title">Agenda</h2>
        <p class="slide-subtitle">금일 주간회의 보고 목차</p>
        <div class="content-area">
            <div class="two-column">
                <div>
                    <ul class="custom-list">
                        <li>
                            <strong>01. Dasan Open Party (D-12)</strong>
                            다산신도시점 모객 현황 및 대전점 비교 심층 분석
                        </li>
                        <li>
                            <strong>02. YouTube Activation [B2B]</strong>
                            솔레아스 비즈니스: 예비 창업자/지도자 타겟팅 성과
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <ul class="custom-list">
                        <li>
                            <strong>03. YouTube Activation [B2C]</strong>
                            솔레아스 풋볼: 학부모/회원 타겟팅 및 팬덤 활성화
                        </li>
                        <li>
                            <strong>04. Newsletter & Display</strong>
                            지점 디스플레이 적용 현황 및 뉴스레터 배포 결과
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Slide 3: Section 1 -->
    <div class="slide-container section-title-layout">
        <div style="text-align:center;">
            <p style="color: var(--color-grey); margin-bottom: 20px;">SECTION 01</p>
            <hr>
            <h2>Dasan Open Party</h2>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Slide 4: Recruitment Status (Funnel) -->
    <div class="slide-container">
        <h2 class="slide-title">Recruitment Status</h2>
        <p class="slide-subtitle">오픈파티 D-12 모객 현황 요약</p>
        <div class="content-area">
            <div class="highlight-numbers-layout">
                <div class="number-item">
                    <div class="number-val">314</div>
                    <div class="number-label">Total Inquiries<br>(목표 대비 125%)</div>
                </div>
                <div class="number-item">
                    <div class="number-val" style="color: var(--color-gold);">298</div>
                    <div class="number-label">Contacted<br>(응답률 94.9%)</div>
                </div>
                <div class="number-item">
                    <div class="number-val">263</div>
                    <div class="number-label">Confirmed<br>(전환율 83.8%)</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="insight-box">
                <strong>Insight:</strong> 모집 정원의 105% 초과 달성, 기대 이상의 초기 반응
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Slide 5: Comparative Analysis Table -->
    <div class="slide-container">
        <h2 class="slide-title">Comparative Analysis</h2>
        <p class="slide-subtitle">대전도안점(Ref) vs 다산신도시점(Cur)</p>
        <div class="content-area">
            <table>
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>구분</th>
                        <th>대전도안 (Ref)</th>
                        <th>다산신도시 (Cur)</th>
                        <th>성장률/증감</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <tr>
                        <td>D-Day 시점</td>
                        <td>D-12</td>
                        <td>D-12</td>
                        <td>-</td>
                    </tr>
```

### 🕒 2026. 2. 11. 오후 5:54:41 KST
- **내용**: function createSoleasPresentation() {
  // 1. 프레젠테이션 생성
  var deck = SlidesApp.create("Soleas Weekly Report_260212");
  var slides = deck.getSlides();
  
  // 첫 번째 빈 슬라이드 제거
  if (slides.length > 0) {
    slides[0].remove();
  }

  // 2. 브랜드 컬러 정의
  var COLOR_BG = '#111111';      // 딥 블랙
  var COLOR_GOLD = '#CCB85F';    // 솔레아스 골드
  var COLOR_GREEN = '#2A5C35';   // 피치 그린
  var COLOR_WHITE = '#FFFFFF';
  var COLOR_GREY = '#A3A3A3';

  // 3. 슬라이드 생성 함수
  function addSlide(layoutType, titleText, subText, bodyText) {
    var slide = deck.appendSlide(SlidesApp.PredefinedLayout.BLANK);
    var background = slide.getBackground();
    background.setSolidFill(COLOR_BG);

    // 공통: 헤더/타이틀 (표지 제외)
    if (layoutType !== 'TITLE' && layoutType !== 'SECTION') {
      // 상단 라인
      var line = slide.insertLine(SlidesApp.LineCategory.STRAIGHT, 50, 80, 670, 80);
      line.getLineFill().setSolidFill(COLOR_GREY);
      
      // 타이틀
      var titleBox = slide.insertTextBox(titleText);
      titleBox.setLeft(50).setTop(30).setWidth(600).setHeight(50);
      var titleStyle = titleBox.getText().getTextStyle();
      titleStyle.setFontFamily("Times New Roman").setFontSize(36).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GOLD).setBold(true);

      // 서브 타이틀
      if (subText) {
        var subBox = slide.insertTextBox(subText);
        subBox.setLeft(50).setTop(85).setWidth(600).setHeight(30);
        var subStyle = subBox.getText().getTextStyle();
        subStyle.setFontFamily("Roboto").setFontSize(14).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GREY);
      }
    }

    return slide;
  }

  // --- 슬라이드 1: 표지 ---
  var slide1 = deck.appendSlide(SlidesApp.PredefinedLayout.BLANK);
  slide1.getBackground().setSolidFill(COLOR_BG);
  
  var title1 = slide1.insertTextBox("MARKETING & CS\nPERFORMANCE REVIEW");
  title1.setLeft(100).setTop(200).setWidth(600).setHeight(200);
  title1.getText().getTextStyle().setFontFamily("Times New Roman").setFontSize(60).setForegroundColor(COLOR_WHITE).setBold(true);
  
  var sub1 = slide1.insertTextBox("마케팅 & CS팀 주간 성과 상세 보고");
  sub1.setLeft(110).setTop(420).setWidth(500);
  sub1.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(24).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GOLD);

  var info1 = slide1.insertTextBox("2026. 02. 12 (목) | 발표자: 강승훈 과장");
  info1.setLeft(110).setTop(600).setWidth(400);
  info1.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(14).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GREY);


  // --- 슬라이드 2: 목차 ---
  var slide2 = addSlide('NORMAL', 'Agenda', '금일 주간회의 보고 목차');
  var agendaText = "01. Dasan Open Party (D-12)\n다산신도시점 모객 현황 및 대전점 비교 심층 분석\n\n" +
                   "02. YouTube Activation [B2B]\n솔레아스 비즈니스: 예비 창업자/지도자 타겟팅 성과\n\n" +
                   "03. YouTube Activation [B2C]\n솔레아스 풋볼: 학부모/회원 타겟팅 및 팬덤 활성화\n\n" +
                   "04. Newsletter & Display\n지점 디스플레이 적용 현황 및 뉴스레터 배포 결과";
  
  var agendaBox = slide2.insertTextBox(agendaText);
  agendaBox.setLeft(100).setTop(150).setWidth(600).setHeight(400);
  agendaBox.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(18).setForegroundColor(COLOR_WHITE).setLineSpacing(150);


  // --- 슬라이드 3: 섹션 1 커버 ---
  var slide3 = deck.appendSlide(SlidesApp.PredefinedLayout.BLANK);
  slide3.getBackground().setSolidFill(COLOR_BG);
  var sec1Title = slide3.insertTextBox("SECTION 01\nDasan Open Party");
  sec1Title.setLeft(0).setTop(250).setWidth(720).setHeight(200);
  sec1Title.getText().getParagraphStyle().setParagraphAlignment(SlidesApp.ParagraphAlignment.CENTER);
  sec1Title.getText().getTextStyle().setFontFamily("Times New Roman").setFontSize(50).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GOLD).setBold(true);


  // --- 슬라이드 4: 모객 현황 (Funnel) ---
  var slide4 = addSlide('NORMAL', 'Recruitment Status', '오픈파티 D-12 모객 현황 요약');
  
  // Funnel Text
  var funnelText = "1. Total Inquiries (총 유입): 314명 (목표 대비 125%)\n\n" +
                   "2. Contacted (연결 성공): 298명 (응답률 94.9%)\n\n" +
                   "3. Confirmed (참석 확정): 263명 (전환율 83.8%)";
  
  var fBox = slide4.insertTextBox(funnelText);
  fBox.setLeft(150).setTop(200).setWidth(500).setHeight(300);
  fBox.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(20).setForegroundColor(COLOR_WHITE).setBold(true);
  
  // Insight
  var insight4 = slide4.insertTextBox("Insight: 모집 정원의 105% 초과 달성, 기대 이상의 초기 반응");
  insight4.setLeft(150).setTop(500).setWidth(500);
  insight4.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(16).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GOLD);


  // --- 슬라이드 5: 상세 비교 (Table) ---
  var slide5 = addSlide('NORMAL', 'Comparative Analysis', '대전도안점(Ref) vs 다산신도시점(Cur)');
  
  // Table creation
  var table = slide5.insertTable(6, 4);
  table.setLeft(50).setTop(150).setWidth(600).setHeight(300);
  
  var data = [
    ["구분", "대전도안 (Ref)", "다산신도시 (Cur)", "성장률/증감"],
    ["D-Day 시점", "D-12", "D-12", "-"],
    ["총 DB 유입", "274명", "314명", "▲ 114%"],
    ["참석 확정", "207명", "263명", "▲ 56명 증가"],
    ["확정 전환율", "75.5%", "83.8%", "▲ 8.3%p"],
    ["이탈(취소)", "20명 (7.3%)", "25명 (7.9%)", "방어율 우수"]
  ];

  for (var i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
    for (var j = 0; j < 4; j++) {
      var cell = table.getCell(i, j);
      cell.getText().setText(data[i][j]);
      cell.getText().getTextStyle().setForegroundColor(COLOR_WHITE).setFontSize(12);
      if (i === 0) {
        cell.getFill().setSolidFill(COLOR_GOLD);
        cell.getText().getTextStyle().setForegroundColor(COLOR_BG).setBold(true);
      }
    }
  }


  // --- 슬라이드 6: CS 품질 ---
  var slide6 = addSlide('NORMAL', 'CS Management Efficiency', '고객 관리 품질 지표');
  
  var csText = "■ 부재율(미연결) 비교\n" +
               "- 대전: 12.4% (34명)\n" +
               "- 다산: 5.1% (16명) [BEST]\n\n" +
               "■ Insight\n" +
               "- 즉각적인 해피콜 대응으로 이탈 DB 최소화\n" +
               "- 부재율을 절반 이하로 줄인 것이 모객 성공의 핵심 Key";

  csBox.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(18).setForegroundColor(COLOR_WHITE);


  // --- 슬라이드 7: 섹션 2 커버 ---

  // --- 슬라이드 8: B2B 요약 ---

전 채팅방에서 계속 오류가 나 

이 부분들 모든 채팅방을 보고 위에 내용으로 내가 주간회의 자료를어떻게 만드는지 보고, 

구글 슬라이드로 만들 수 있게 수정해줘 항목을 검색함

제공해주신 스크립트 내용을 바탕으로, 요청하신 브랜드 컬러(딥 블랙, 솔레아스 골드, 피치 그린)를 완벽하게 반영한 HTML 프레젠테이션을 생성해 드리겠습니다.
스크립트의 로직을 시각적인 슬라이드로 변환하여, 실제 구글 슬라이드에서 구현되었을 때의 모습을 미리 확인하실 수 있습니다.
Soleas Weekly Report 프레젠테이션이 준비되었습니다! 요청하신 내용에 따라 브랜드 컬러와 데이터를 반영하여 깔끔하게 정리했습니다. 내용을 확인해 보시고 수정이 필요하면 말씀해 주세요.

---

### 🕒 2026. 2. 11. 오후 5:52:27 KST
- **내용**: 구글 슬라이드로 내보내기 가능하게 수정해줘 항목을 검색함

강PD님, "클릭 한 번으로 구글 슬라이드가 자동 생성되는" 가장 확실한 방법을 준비했습니다.
제가 직접 파일을 보낼 수는 없지만, [구글 앱스 스크립트(Google Apps Script)] 코드를 짜드렸습니다. 이 코드를 복사해서 붙여넣기만 하면, 배경색(검정), 로고 컬러(골드/그린), 16페이지 텍스트가 모두 적용된 슬라이드가 자동으로 만들어집니다.
🚀 [방법] 구글 슬라이드 자동 생성기 (30초 컷)

웹브라우저 주소창에 slides.new를 입력해 새 구글 슬라이드를 엽니다.
상단 메뉴에서 [확장 프로그램] > **[Apps Script]**를 클릭합니다.
나오는 코드 창의 내용을 모두 지우고, 아래 코드를 통째로 복사해서 붙여넣습니다.
상단 [저장] (디스켓 아이콘) 후 [실행] (▷ 버튼)을 누릅니다.
권한 허용 창이 뜨면 [권한 검토] > 계정 선택 > [고급] > [이동(안전하지 않음)] > **[허용]**을 누르세요. (본인이 본인 계정에서 실행하는 것이라 안전합니다.)
**"실행 완료"**가 뜨면 구글 드라이브에 **'Soleas Weekly Report_260212'**라는 새 파일이 생깁니다!


📋 [복사할 코드] 아래 내용을 전부 복사하세요.
function createSoleasPresentation() {
  // 1. 프레젠테이션 생성
  var deck = SlidesApp.create("Soleas Weekly Report_260212");
  var slides = deck.getSlides();
  
  // 첫 번째 빈 슬라이드 제거
  if (slides.length > 0) {
    slides[0].remove();
  }

  // 2. 브랜드 컬러 정의
  var COLOR_BG = '#111111';      // 딥 블랙
  var COLOR_GOLD = '#CCB85F';    // 솔레아스 골드
  var COLOR_GREEN = '#2A5C35';   // 피치 그린
  var COLOR_WHITE = '#FFFFFF';
  var COLOR_GREY = '#A3A3A3';

  // 3. 슬라이드 생성 함수
  function addSlide(layoutType, titleText, subText, bodyText) {
    var slide = deck.appendSlide(SlidesApp.PredefinedLayout.BLANK);
    var background = slide.getBackground();
    background.setSolidFill(COLOR_BG);

    // 공통: 헤더/타이틀 (표지 제외)
    if (layoutType !== 'TITLE' && layoutType !== 'SECTION') {
      // 상단 라인
      var line = slide.insertLine(SlidesApp.LineCategory.STRAIGHT, 50, 80, 670, 80);
      line.getLineFill().setSolidFill(COLOR_GREY);
      
      // 타이틀
      var titleBox = slide.insertTextBox(titleText);
      titleBox.setLeft(50).setTop(30).setWidth(600).setHeight(50);
      var titleStyle = titleBox.getText().getTextStyle();
      titleStyle.setFontFamily("Times New Roman").setFontSize(36).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GOLD).setBold(true);

      // 서브 타이틀
      if (subText) {
        var subBox = slide.insertTextBox(subText);
        subBox.setLeft(50).setTop(85).setWidth(600).setHeight(30);
        var subStyle = subBox.getText().getTextStyle();
        subStyle.setFontFamily("Roboto").setFontSize(14).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GREY);
      }
    }

    return slide;
  }

  // --- 슬라이드 1: 표지 ---
  var slide1 = deck.appendSlide(SlidesApp.PredefinedLayout.BLANK);
  slide1.getBackground().setSolidFill(COLOR_BG);
  
  var title1 = slide1.insertTextBox("MARKETING & CS\nPERFORMANCE REVIEW");
  title1.setLeft(100).setTop(200).setWidth(600).setHeight(200);
  title1.getText().getTextStyle().setFontFamily("Times New Roman").setFontSize(60).setForegroundColor(COLOR_WHITE).setBold(true);
  
  var sub1 = slide1.insertTextBox("마케팅 & CS팀 주간 성과 상세 보고");
  sub1.setLeft(110).setTop(420).setWidth(500);
  sub1.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(24).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GOLD);

  var info1 = slide1.insertTextBox("2026. 02. 12 (목) | 발표자: 강승훈 과장");
  info1.setLeft(110).setTop(600).setWidth(400);
  info1.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(14).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GREY);


  // --- 슬라이드 2: 목차 ---
  var slide2 = addSlide('NORMAL', 'Agenda', '금일 주간회의 보고 목차');
  var agendaText = "01. Dasan Open Party (D-12)\n다산신도시점 모객 현황 및 대전점 비교 심층 분석\n\n" +
                   "02. YouTube Activation [B2B]\n솔레아스 비즈니스: 예비 창업자/지도자 타겟팅 성과\n\n" +
                   "03. YouTube Activation [B2C]\n솔레아스 풋볼: 학부모/회원 타겟팅 및 팬덤 활성화\n\n" +
                   "04. Newsletter & Display\n지점 디스플레이 적용 현황 및 뉴스레터 배포 결과";
  
  var agendaBox = slide2.insertTextBox(agendaText);
  agendaBox.setLeft(100).setTop(150).setWidth(600).setHeight(400);
  agendaBox.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(18).setForegroundColor(COLOR_WHITE).setLineSpacing(150);


  // --- 슬라이드 3: 섹션 1 커버 ---
  var slide3 = deck.appendSlide(SlidesApp.PredefinedLayout.BLANK);
  slide3.getBackground().setSolidFill(COLOR_BG);
  var sec1Title = slide3.insertTextBox("SECTION 01\nDasan Open Party");
  sec1Title.setLeft(0).setTop(250).setWidth(720).setHeight(200);
  sec1Title.getText().getParagraphStyle().setParagraphAlignment(SlidesApp.ParagraphAlignment.CENTER);
  sec1Title.getText().getTextStyle().setFontFamily("Times New Roman").setFontSize(50).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GOLD).setBold(true);


  // --- 슬라이드 4: 모객 현황 (Funnel) ---
  var slide4 = addSlide('NORMAL', 'Recruitment Status', '오픈파티 D-12 모객 현황 요약');
  
  // Funnel Text
  var funnelText = "1. Total Inquiries (총 유입): 314명 (목표 대비 125%)\n\n" +
                   "2. Contacted (연결 성공): 298명 (응답률 94.9%)\n\n" +
                   "3. Confirmed (참석 확정): 263명 (전환율 83.8%)";
  
  var fBox = slide4.insertTextBox(funnelText);
  fBox.setLeft(150).setTop(200).setWidth(500).setHeight(300);
  fBox.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(20).setForegroundColor(COLOR_WHITE).setBold(true);
  
  // Insight
  var insight4 = slide4.insertTextBox("Insight: 모집 정원의 105% 초과 달성, 기대 이상의 초기 반응");
  insight4.setLeft(150).setTop(500).setWidth(500);
  insight4.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(16).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GOLD);


  // --- 슬라이드 5: 상세 비교 (Table) ---
  var slide5 = addSlide('NORMAL', 'Comparative Analysis', '대전도안점(Ref) vs 다산신도시점(Cur)');
  
  // Table creation
  var table = slide5.insertTable(6, 4);
  table.setLeft(50).setTop(150).setWidth(600).setHeight(300);
  
  var data = [
    ["구분", "대전도안 (Ref)", "다산신도시 (Cur)", "성장률/증감"],
    ["D-Day 시점", "D-12", "D-12", "-"],
    ["총 DB 유입", "274명", "314명", "▲ 114%"],
    ["참석 확정", "207명", "263명", "▲ 56명 증가"],
    ["확정 전환율", "75.5%", "83.8%", "▲ 8.3%p"],
    ["이탈(취소)", "20명 (7.3%)", "25명 (7.9%)", "방어율 우수"]
  ];

  for (var i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
    for (var j = 0; j < 4; j++) {
      var cell = table.getCell(i, j);
      cell.getText().setText(data[i][j]);
      cell.getText().getTextStyle().setForegroundColor(COLOR_WHITE).setFontSize(12);
      if (i === 0) {
        cell.getFill().setSolidFill(COLOR_GOLD);
        cell.getText().getTextStyle().setForegroundColor(COLOR_BG).setBold(true);
      }
    }
  }


  // --- 슬라이드 6: CS 품질 ---
  var slide6 = addSlide('NORMAL', 'CS Management Efficiency', '고객 관리 품질 지표');
  
  var csText = "■ 부재율(미연결) 비교\n" +
               "- 대전: 12.4% (34명)\n" +
               "- 다산: 5.1% (16명) [BEST]\n\n" +
               "■ Insight\n" +
               "- 즉각적인 해피콜 대응으로 이탈 DB 최소화\n" +
               "- 부재율을 절반 이하로 줄인 것이 모객 성공의 핵심 Key";
               
  var csBox = slide6.insertTextBox(csText);
  csBox.setLeft(100).setTop(150).setWidth(550);
  csBox.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(18).setForegroundColor(COLOR_WHITE);


  // --- 슬라이드 7: 섹션 2 커버 ---
  var slide7 = deck.appendSlide(SlidesApp.PredefinedLayout.BLANK);
  slide7.getBackground().setSolidFill(COLOR_BG);
  var sec2Title = slide7.insertTextBox("SECTION 02\nYouTube Performance [B2B]");
  sec2Title.setLeft(0).setTop(250).setWidth(720).setHeight(200);
  sec2Title.getText().getParagraphStyle().setParagraphAlignment(SlidesApp.ParagraphAlignment.CENTER);
  sec2Title.getText().getTextStyle().setFontFamily("Times New Roman").setFontSize(50).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GOLD).setBold(true);


  // --- 슬라이드 8: B2B 요약 ---
  var slide8 = addSlide('NORMAL', 'Channel Overview: Business', '주간 채널 성과 요약 (2/3 ~ 2/9)');
  
  var b2bStats = "Total Views: 7,242회\nValuation: ₩ 506,940\n\n" +
                 "Weekly Trend:\n" +
                 "2/3(977) → 2/6(1,603/최고점) → 2/9(1,417)";
  
  var b2bBox = slide8.insertTextBox(b2bStats);
  b2bBox.setLeft(100).setTop(150).setWidth(500);
  b2bBox.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(24).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GOLD);


  // --- 슬라이드 9: B2B 베스트 ---
  var slide9 = addSlide('NORMAL', 'Best Content Analysis [B2B]', '축구 강사를 교육하는데 웬 수학기호가?');
  
  // Placeholder for Image
  var shape9 = slide9.insertShape(SlidesApp.ShapeType.RECTANGLE, 50, 150, 300, 170);
  shape9.getText().setText("[썸네일 이미지 삽입]").getTextStyle().setForegroundColor(COLOR_BG);
  shape9.getFill().setSolidFill(COLOR_GREY);

  var b2bContentText = "업로드: 2/9\n조회수: 1,018회\n가치: ₩ 71,260\n\n" +
                       "성공 요인:\n'체육 교육에 수학?'이라는 이질적 결합으로 호기심 자극\n전문성 신뢰도 확보";
  var b2bCBox = slide9.insertTextBox(b2bContentText);
  b2bCBox.setLeft(370).setTop(150).setWidth(300);
  b2bCBox.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(16).setForegroundColor(COLOR_WHITE);


  // --- 슬라이드 10: 섹션 3 커버 ---
  var slide10 = deck.appendSlide(SlidesApp.PredefinedLayout.BLANK);
  slide10.getBackground().setSolidFill(COLOR_BG);
  var sec3Title = slide10.insertTextBox("SECTION 03\nYouTube Performance [B2C]");
  sec3Title.setLeft(0).setTop(250).setWidth(720).setHeight(200);
  sec3Title.getText().getParagraphStyle().setParagraphAlignment(SlidesApp.ParagraphAlignment.CENTER);
  sec3Title.getText().getTextStyle().setFontFamily("Times New Roman").setFontSize(50).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GREEN).setBold(true);


  // --- 슬라이드 11: B2C 요약 ---
  var slide11 = addSlide('NORMAL', 'Channel Overview: Football', '주간 채널 성과 요약 (2/3 ~ 2/9)');
  
  var b2cStats = "Total Views: 27,765회 (압도적)\nValuation: ₩ 1,943,550\n\n" +
                 "Weekly Trend:\n" +
                 "2/6(5,448/최고점) → 꾸준히 일 2~3천 유지";
  
  var b2cBox = slide11.insertTextBox(b2cStats);
  b2cBox.setLeft(100).setTop(150).setWidth(500);
  b2cBox.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(24).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GREEN);


  // --- 슬라이드 12: B2C 베스트 ---
  var slide12 = addSlide('NORMAL', 'Best Content Analysis [B2C]', '감독님이랑 잘 안 맞을 때');
  
  // Placeholder for Image
  var shape12 = slide12.insertShape(SlidesApp.ShapeType.RECTANGLE, 50, 150, 300, 170);
  shape12.getText().setText("[썸네일 이미지 삽입]").getTextStyle().setForegroundColor(COLOR_BG);
  shape12.getFill().setSolidFill(COLOR_GREEN);

  var b2cContentText = "업로드: 2/6\n조회수: 3,314회\n가치: ₩ 231,980\n\n" +
                       "성공 요인:\n선수반 학부모들의 Pain Point(갈등) 공략\n댓글, 공유 등 커뮤니티 확산";
  var b2cCBox = slide12.insertTextBox(b2cContentText);
  b2cCBox.setLeft(370).setTop(150).setWidth(300);
  b2cCBox.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(16).setForegroundColor(COLOR_WHITE);


  // --- 슬라이드 13: ROI 종합 ---
  var slide13 = addSlide('NORMAL', 'Weekly Marketing ROI', '주간 통합 광고 환산 가치');
  
  var roiText = "Total Views: 35,007회\nTotal Value: ₩ 2,450,490\n\n" + 
                "\"유튜브 오가닉 트래픽만으로 주간 약 245만 원 상당의 광고 대체 효과 창출\"";
  
  var roiBox = slide13.insertTextBox(roiText);
  roiBox.setLeft(100).setTop(150).setWidth(500);
  roiBox.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(24).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GOLD).setBold(true);


  // --- 슬라이드 14: 뉴스레터 ---
  var slide14 = addSlide('NORMAL', 'Newsletter & Display', '지점별 적용 현황');
  
  var newsText = "✅ 적용 완료 지점 리스트\n" +
                 "- 송파 문정점\n- 시흥 은계점\n- 부천 상동점\n- 광명 철산점\n" +
                 "- 천안 불당점\n- 대전 도안점\n- 송파 잠실점";
  
  var newsBox = slide14.insertTextBox(newsText);
  newsBox.setLeft(50).setTop(150).setWidth(300);
  newsBox.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(18).setForegroundColor(COLOR_WHITE);
  
  var mockShape = slide14.insertShape(SlidesApp.ShapeType.RECTANGLE, 400, 150, 300, 200);
  mockShape.getText().setText("[디스플레이 목업 사진 배치]");


  // --- 슬라이드 15: 향후 계획 ---
  var slide15 = addSlide('NORMAL', 'Action Plan', '차주 운영 계획');
  
  var planText = "1. 오픈파티 (D-7)\n- 잔여석 마감 임박 문자 발송\n- 노쇼(No-Show) 방지 콜 진행\n\n" +
                 "2. 유튜브\n- '채용 시즌' 맞춤형 B2B 콘텐츠 기획\n\n" +
                 "3. 뉴스레터\n- 지점별 활용 인증샷 취합";
  
  var planBox = slide15.insertTextBox(planText);
  planBox.setLeft(100).setTop(150).setWidth(500);
  planBox.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(20).setForegroundColor(COLOR_WHITE);


  // --- 슬라이드 16: Q&A ---
  var slide16 = deck.appendSlide(SlidesApp.PredefinedLayout.BLANK);
  slide16.getBackground().setSolidFill(COLOR_BG);
  
  var qaTitle = slide16.insertTextBox("Q & A");
  qaTitle.setLeft(200).setTop(250).setWidth(320);
  qaTitle.getText().getParagraphStyle().setParagraphAlignment(SlidesApp.ParagraphAlignment.CENTER);
  qaTitle.getText().getTextStyle().setFontFamily("Times New Roman").setFontSize(80).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GOLD).setBold(true);
  
  var footer = slide16.insertTextBox("경청해 주셔서 감사합니다.\nMarketing & CS Team");
  footer.setLeft(200).setTop(400).setWidth(320);
  footer.getText().getParagraphStyle().setParagraphAlignment(SlidesApp.ParagraphAlignment.CENTER);
  footer.getText().getTextStyle().setFontSize(18).setForegroundColor(COLOR_GREY);

}


✅ 완료 후 해주실 작업 (마무리)

생성된 슬라이드를 엽니다.
**[썸네일 이미지 삽입]**이라고 적힌 회색 박스를 지우고, 실제 유튜브 썸네일과 목업 이미지를 그 자리에 붙여넣으세요.
필요하다면 폰트 크기나 배치를 미세 조정하시면 됩니다. (데이터는 제가 완벽하게 넣어두었습니다.)

이 방법이 가장 빠르고 정확하게 강PD님의 퇴근 시간을 앞당겨 드릴 겁니다! 성공적인 발표 되세요.

### 🕒 2026. 2. 11. 오후 5:51:05 KST
- **내용**: 제목이 Soleas Weekly Report v2 (Stable) 인 Gemini 캔버스 생성됨
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Soleas Weekly Report (16 Pages)</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Sans+KR:wght@300;400;500;700;900&family=Times+New+Roman:wght@700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css">
    <style>
        /* GLOBAL SETTINGS */
        :root {
            --bg-black: #111111;
            --accent-gold: #CCB85F;
            --accent-green: #2A5C35;
            --text-white: #FFFFFF;
            --text-grey: #A3A3A3;
        }
        body {
            background-color: #000;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 20px;
            font-family: 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 40px;
        }
        
        /* SLIDE COMMON LAYOUT (16:9 Aspect Ratio) */
        .slide {
            width: 1280px;
            height: 720px;
            background-color: var(--bg-black);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            border: 1px solid #333;
            color: var(--text-white);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        /* HEADER STYLES */
        .header {
            padding: 40px 60px 20px 60px;
            z-index: 1;
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: flex-end;
        }
        .header-title {
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
            font-size: 42px;
            color: var(--accent-gold);
            line-height: 1;
        }
        .header-sub {
            font-size: 18px;
            color: var(--text-grey);
            margin-top: 5px;
        }
        .slide-num {
            font-family: 'Times New Roman';
            font-size: 24px;
            color: var(--text-grey);
            opacity: 0.5;
        }

        /* CONTENT AREA */
        .content {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 40px 60px;
            z-index: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        /* SECTION COVER LAYOUT */
        .section-cover {
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            text-align: center;
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.7), rgba(0,0,0,0.7));
        }
        .section-num {
            font-family: 'Times New Roman';
            font-size: 32px;
            color: var(--accent-gold);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
        }
        .section-title {
            font-family: 'Times New Roman';
            font-size: 80px;
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .section-desc {
            font-size: 24px;
            color: var(--text-grey);
            border-top: 2px solid var(--accent-green);
            padding-top: 30px;
            width: 600px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        /* COMPONENTS */
        .box {
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
            border: 1px solid #333;
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 30px;
        }
        .highlight-text { color: var(--accent-gold); font-weight: 700; }
        .green-text { color: var(--accent-green); font-weight: 700; }
        
        .row { display: flex; gap: 40px; height: 100%; }
        .col { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; }

        /* TABLE */
        table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 20px; text-align: center; }
        th { border-bottom: 2px solid var(--accent-gold); padding: 15px; color: var(--accent-gold); }
        td { border-bottom: 1px solid #333; padding: 15px; color: var(--text-grey); }
        tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
        .table-highlight { color: #fff; font-weight: 700; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); }

        /* FUNNEL */
        .funnel-step {
            background: #222;
            margin: 10px auto;
            padding: 20px;
            text-align: center;
            color: #fff;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 24px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            position: relative;
        }
        .funnel-1 { width: 80%; border-left: 10px solid #555; }
        .funnel-2 { width: 70%; border-left: 10px solid var(--accent-gold); }
        .funnel-3 { width: 60%; border-left: 10px solid var(--accent-green); }

    </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- SLIDE 1: COVER -->
<div class="slide">
    <div class="content" style="align-items: center; text-align: center; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(204, 184, 95, 0.1), transparent 70%);">
        <div style="color: var(--accent-gold); letter-spacing: 4px; font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 20px;">SOLEAS WEEKLY REPORT</div>
        <h1 style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 90px; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 40px;">MARKETING & CS<br>PERFORMANCE REVIEW</h1>
        <div style="font-size: 32px; font-weight: 300; border-left: 5px solid var(--accent-green); padding-left: 30px; margin-bottom: 80px;">
            마케팅 & CS팀 주간 성과 상세 보고
        </div>
        <div style="font-size: 20px; color: var(--text-grey);">2026. 02. 12 (목) | 발표자: 강승훈 과장</div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- SLIDE 2: AGENDA -->
<div class="slide">
    <div class="header">
        <div>
            <div class="header-title">Agenda</div>
            <div class="header-sub">금일 보고 목차</div>
        </div>
        <div class="slide-num">02</div>
    </div>
    <div class="content">
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 40px; padding-left: 40px;">
            <div class="row" style="align-items: center; height: auto;">
                <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 60px; color: var(--accent-gold);">01</div>
                <div><div style="font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700;">Dasan Open Party (D-12)</div><div style="font-size: 20px; color: var(--text-grey);">다산신도시점 모객 현황 및 대전점 비교 심층 분석</div></div>
            </div>
            <div class="row" style="align-items: center; height: auto;">
                <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 60px; color: var(--accent-gold);">02</div>
                <div><div style="font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700;">YouTube Activation [B2B]</div><div style="font-size: 20px; color: var(--text-grey);">솔레아스 비즈니스: 예비 창업자/지도자 타겟팅 성과</div></div>
            </div>
            <div class="row" style="align-items: center; height: auto;">
                <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 60px; color: var(--accent-gold);">03</div>
                <div><div style="font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700;">YouTube Activation [B2C]</div><div style="font-size: 20px; color: var(--text-grey);">솔레아스 풋볼: 학부모/회원 타겟팅 및 팬덤 활성화</div></div>
            </div>
            <div class="row" style="align-items: center; height: auto;">
                <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 60px; color: var(--accent-gold);">04</div>
                <div><div style="font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700;">Newsletter & Display</div><div style="font-size: 20px; color: var(--text-grey);">지점 디스플레이 적용 현황 및 뉴스레터 배포 결과</div></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- SLIDE 3: SECTION 1 COVER -->
<div class="slide">
    <div class="content section-cover">
        <div class="section-num">SECTION 01</div>
        <div class="section-title">Dasan Open Party</div>
        <div class="section-desc">다산신도시점 오픈파티 D-12 성과 분석</div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- SLIDE 4: FUNNEL -->
<div class="slide">
    <div class="header">
        <div><div class="header-title">Recruitment Status</div><div class="header-sub">오픈파티 D-12 모객 현황 요약</div></div>
        <div class="slide-num">04</div>
    </div>
    <div class="content">
        <h3 style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 30px;">"모집 정원의 <span class="highlight-text">105%</span> 초과 달성, 기대 이상의 초기 반응"</h3>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; width: 80%; margin: 0 auto;">
            <div class="funnel-step funnel-1">
                <div style="font-size: 18px; color: #aaa; margin-bottom: 5px;">Total Inquiries (총 유입)</div>
                <div>314명 <span style="font-size: 16px; color: var(--accent-gold);">(목표 대비 125%)</span></div>
            </div>
            <div style="height: 20px; border-left: 2px dashed #555;"></div>
            <div class="funnel-step funnel-2">
                <div style="font-size: 18px; color: #aaa; margin-bottom: 5px;">Contacted (연결 성공)</div>
                <div>298명 <span style="font-size: 16px;">(응답률 94.9%)</span></div>
            </div>
            <div style="height: 20px; border-left: 2px dashed #555;"></div>
            <div class="funnel-step funnel-3">
                <div style="font-size: 18px; color: #aaa; margin-bottom: 5px;">Confirmed (참석 확정)</div>
                <div>263명 <span style="font-size: 16px; color: #fff;">(전환율 83.8%)</span></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- SLIDE 5: COMPARATIVE ANALYSIS -->
<div class="slide">
    <div class="header">
        <div><div class="header-title">Comparative Analysis</div><div class="header-sub">대전도안점(Reference) 대비 상세 비교</div></div>
        <div class="slide-num">05</div>
    </div>
    <div class="content">
        <div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 30px; font-size: 24px;">
            "양적 유입(<span class="highlight-text">+14%</span>)과 질적 관리(<span class="green-text">+8.3%p</span>) 모두 압도적 우위"
        </div>
        <table>
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>구분</th>
                    <th>대전도안 (Ref)</th>
                    <th>다산신도시 (Cur)</th>
                    <th>성장률 / 증감</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr>
                    <td>D-Day 시점</td>
                    <td>D-12</td>
                    <td>D-12</td>
                    <td>-</td>
                </tr>
                <tr class="table-highlight">
                    <td>총 DB 유입</td>
                    <td>274명</td>
                    <td>314명</td>

                    <td>참석 확정</td>
                    <td>207명</td>
                    <td>263명</td>

                    <td>확정 전환율</td>

                    <td>83.8%</td>

                </tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- SLIDE 6: CS QUALITY -->
<div class="slide">
    <div class="header">
        <div><div class="header-title">CS Management Efficiency</div><div class="header-sub">고객 관리(CS) 품질 지표 분석</div></div>
        <div class="slide-num">06</div>
    </div>
    <div class="content">

            <div class="col">

                    <div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-around; height: 300px; padding-top: 40px;">
                        <div style="width: 100px; height: 80%; background: #333; position: relative;">
                            <div style="position: absolute; top: -30px; width: 100%; text-align: center;">12.4%</div>
                            <div style="position: absolute; bottom: -30px; width: 100%; text-align: center; color: #aaa;">대전</div>
                        </div>
                        <div style="width: 100px; height: 35%; background: var(--accent-green); position: relative;">
                            <div style="position: absolute; top: -30px; width: 100%; text-align: center; font-weight: 700; font-size: 24px;">5.1%</div>
                            <div style="position: absolute; bottom: -30px; width: 100%; text-align: center;">다산</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col">
                <div class="box" style="height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;">
                    <h3 style="margin-bottom: 20px;">💡 Insight</h3>
                    <ul style="font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.8; color: #ccc;">
                        <li>즉각적인 해피콜 대응으로 <strong>이탈 DB(Dead Leads)</strong> 최소화</li>
                        <li>부재율을 <strong>절반 이하</strong>로 줄인 것이 모객 성공의 <span class="highlight-text">핵심 Key</span></li>
                        <li>프라이빗 카운셀링 대상 <strong>10명(3.2%)</strong> 별도 밀착 관리 진행 중</li>

<!-- SLIDE 7: SECTION 2 COVER -->

<!-- SLIDE 8: B2B SUMMARY -->
<div class="slide">
    <div class="header">
        <div><div class="header-title">Channel Overview: Business</div><div class="header-sub">주간 채널 성과 요약 (2/3 ~ 2/9)</div></div>

    <div class="content">

            <div class="col">
                <div class="box" style="text-align: center; border-color: var(--accent-gold);">
                    <div style="font-size: 24px; color: #aaa; margin-bottom: 10px;">Total Views (주간)</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 70px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff;">7,242<span style="font-size: 30px;">회</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col">
                <div class="box" style="text-align: center; background: rgba(204, 184, 95, 0.1);">
                    <div style="font-size: 24px; color: #aaa; margin-bottom: 10px;">Valuation (x70원)</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 70px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-gold);">₩ 506,940</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="box" style="margin-top: 30px;">
            <h3 style="margin-bottom: 15px; color: var(--text-grey);">Weekly Trend Insight</h3>
            <div style="font-size: 20px;">
                • 2/3(977) → <span class="highlight-text">2/6(1,603/최고점)</span> → 2/9(1,417)<br>
                • 주말보다 평일(목/금)에 예비 창업자들의 시청 빈도가 높게 나타남.
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- SLIDE 9: B2B BEST CONTENT -->
<div class="slide">
    <div class="header">
        <div><div class="header-title">Best Content Analysis</div><div class="header-sub">B2B 채널 베스트 콘텐츠 심층 분석</div></div>
        <div class="slide-num">09</div>
    </div>
    <div class="content">
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col" style="flex: 0.4;">
                <div style="width: 100%; height: 250px; background: #333; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #aaa; border: 1px solid #555;">
                    
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col" style="flex: 0.6;">
                <h3 style="font-size: 28px; margin-bottom: 20px;">"축구 강사를 교육하는데 웬 수학기호가?" (2/9)</h3>
                <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 30px;">
                    <span class="box" style="padding: 10px 20px; font-weight: 700;">조회수: 1,018회</span>
                    <span class="box" style="padding: 10px 20px; color: var(--accent-gold); font-weight: 700;">가치: ₩ 71,260</span>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <div style="color: var(--accent-gold); font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px;">Key Success Factor</div>
                    <ul style="line-height: 1.6; color: #ddd;">
                        <li><strong>Hook:</strong> "체육 교육에 수학?"이라는 이질적 결합으로 호기심 자극</li>
                        <li><strong>Targeting:</strong> '체계적인 교육'을 갈망하는 예비 지도자들의 니즈 적중</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

### 🕒 2026. 2. 11. 오후 5:49:25 KST
- **내용**: 슬라이드 내보내기가 오류가 나네;; 다시 만들어줘 항목을 검색함

강PD님, 슬라이드 내보내기 오류로 불편을 드려 죄송합니다. 시스템 오류나 브라우저 환경에 따라 렌더링 문제가 발생할 수 있습니다.
이번에는 **[안전성 최우선 버전]**으로 코드를 최적화하여 다시 생성해 드립니다.
혹시 모를 오류에 대비해, 디자인은 유지하되 데이터 로딩 방식을 간소화하고 레이아웃 안정성을 높였습니다.
이 코드를 복사해서 HTML 파일로 저장하거나, 프리뷰를 통해 확인하시고 스크린샷 또는 텍스트를 구글 슬라이드에 옮기시면 됩니다.
